name: RegisterPatient
purpose: Validate required fields, create patient record, and generate unique patient_id
behavior: Check that name, dob, contact, insurance are present and non-empty; generate a new patient_id; store patient data in patients database; return success with patient_id

semantic_inputs.name: patient_data
semantic_inputs.description: Patient payload with name, dob, contact, insurance

semantic_outputs.name: patient_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result with success flag, patient_id, and message

postconditions: patient record exists in patients database

inputs.name: patient_data
inputs.description: Patient payload with name, dob, contact, insurance

outputs.name: patient_result
outputs.description: Result with success flag, patient_id, and message

global_vars.description: Write new patient record to patients database

data_operations.description: Insert new patient record with generated patient_id

constraints.description: patient_id must be unique across all patients

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient record is created in patients database with all required fields

name: BookAppointment
purpose: Check patient exists, check doctor availability, create appointment record, send confirmation
behavior: Verify patient_id exists in patients database; check that appointment_time is not in the past; check doctor availability (no conflicting appointments); create appointment record with status 'confirmed'; return success with appointment details

semantic_inputs.name: patient_data
semantic_inputs.description: Patient payload with patient_id, doctor_id, appointment_time

semantic_outputs.name: patient_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result with success flag, appointment_id, and message

postconditions: appointment record exists in appointments database
guarantees: appointment is not in the past

inputs.name: patient_data
inputs.description: Patient payload with patient_id, doctor_id, appointment_time

outputs.name: patient_result
outputs.description: Result with success flag, appointment_id, and message

global_vars.description: Read patient record to verify existence
Read existing appointments for availability check; write new appointment record

data_operations.description: Check patient_id exists in patients database
Check for conflicting appointments at requested time
Create new appointment record with status 'confirmed'

constraints.description: Appointment time must be in the future
No overlapping appointments for the same doctor at the same time

acceptance_criteria.description: Appointment record is created in appointments database with status 'confirmed'

name: RetrieveRecords
purpose: Retrieve all medical records for a patient, sorted by date descending
behavior: Look up patient_id in records database; collect all records for that patient; sort by timestamp descending; return list of records

semantic_outputs.name: patient_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result with success flag, list of records, and message

postconditions: records are returned sorted by date descending

outputs.name: patient_result
outputs.description: Result with success flag, list of records, and message

global_vars.description: Read all records for the given patient_id

data_operations.description: Query records database for all records matching patient_id

constraints.description: Records must be returned sorted by timestamp descending

acceptance_criteria.description: All records for the patient are returned sorted by date descending

name: UpdatePatientProfile
purpose: Update patient profile fields, validate insurance change against external system
behavior: Update provided fields in patients database; if insurance field is present, validate against external system before saving; return success with updated data

semantic_inputs.name: patient_data
semantic_inputs.description: Patient payload with patient_id and fields to update

semantic_outputs.name: patient_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result with success flag, updated data, and message

postconditions: patient profile is updated in database

inputs.name: patient_data
inputs.description: Patient payload with patient_id and fields to update

outputs.name: patient_result
outputs.description: Result with success flag, updated data, and message

global_vars.description: Read current patient record; write updated fields to patients database

data_operations.description: Read current patient record to verify existence and get current data
Write updated fields to patient record

constraints.description: Insurance change must be validated against external system before saving

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient profile is updated in patients database with validated fields
